title: Report
text: Report A Report is a Component that defines the content and layout of printed output of a Uniface application. It is not interactive and cannot be used to update the database. Characteristics Characteristics Icon: Object type code: cpt Main Development Object? Yes Has layout? Yes Layout binding? Implicit Part of: — Contains: Component Entity , Label , Property , Code Container Generalization: Component Specializations: — Compilation output: Signature , ReportName .rpt , ReportName .sig URI format: cpt: ReportName Specialization Report specializes Component in the following ways: It has a layout that is part of the component itself. It does not have triggers for interactive behavior. It compiles to a deployable runtime component ( .rpt ) and signature. Properties Object Properties: Name Type Location Description Documentation Source Properties: Date Modified Configuration Properties: Library Is Modeled Component Modeled Component Behavior Properties: Component Type Data Access Component Behavior State Managed By Self-Contained Database I/O Properties: Input Translation Output Translation Presentation Properties: Index Color Width (xsize) Height (ysize) Character Mode Properties: Borderline Inverse Bright Underline Blink Triggers and Operations trigger accept trigger receiveMessage trigger quit operation exec operation init operation cleanup operation accept operation quit Was this topic helpful?
